stage: SR-01 - Staging Real Unlock Plan + DoR
technical_decisions: Backend staging must use Cloud Run for server.ts/Express.
Firebase Hosting must rewrite /api/** to Cloud Run.
Firebase CLI in CI must use service account / Application Default Credentials.
Playwright real staging must not depend on interactive Google OAuth.
Preferred E2E auth strategy is email/password staging user plus storageState.
Fallback E2E auth strategy is custom token endpoint only in staging/test and protected by secret.
Mercado Pago must use sandbox before UAT.
Firestore and Storage must be tested with real staging rules.

must_include: auth storageState status without raw secret

known_blockers.summary: GitHub remote push blocked by missing credential/token
Real Playwright flow opens interactive Google OAuth
Static Hosting alone does not cover server.ts /api backend
Firestore, Storage, AI/backend and Mercado Pago are not proved in real staging
Local worktree has uncommitted changes that must be classified before push

next_step: Configure credentials through secure channels, classify uncommitted local changes, push to GitHub, provision staging secrets, deploy Firebase/Cloud Run, then execute real staging E2E without misleading mocks.
